# `api.companies.get_fulldetails`

> `GET /companies/{companyId}/fulldetails` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.companies.get_fulldetails(company_id: str) -> CompanyDetails
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab companies get_fulldetails <company_id>
```

GET /companies/{companyId}/fulldetails

## Response

Returns `CompanyDetails`.
